subcodes.first_line: O thou who drinkest the choice wine of My utterance and soarest in the atmosphere of My love! Hearken unto My testimony that there is no God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الشارب رحیق بیانی و الطائر فی هوآء محبتی اسمع شهادتی انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
